heading: Definitions

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: C
children.text: each committee of the Senate or of the House of Representatives with jurisdiction over a Federal entity affected by the applicable section in which the term appears.

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 2 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Federal Communications Commission.

children.heading: Federal entity
children.label: 3 Federal entity
children.text: The term “Federal entity” has the meaning given the term in section 923() of this title.l

children.heading: NTIA
children.label: 4 NTIA
children.text: The term “NTIA” means the National Telecommunications and Information Administration of the Department of Commerce.

children.heading: OMB
children.label: 5 OMB
children.text: The term “OMB” means the Office of Management and Budget.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.
